conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 14 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="59.7% at 5 years" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states: 'The OS rate at 5 years was 59.7% in the orteronel group'. Figure 1 also shows a 5-Year Estimate of 59% for LHRHa plus orteronel."
  B: value="59.7% (at 5 years)" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The OS rate at 5 years was 59.7% in the orteronel group. This is the latest follow-up reported."

---
Column 2: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Control
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the control arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="57.9% at 5 years" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The text states: 'The OS rate at 5 years was ... 57.9% in the control group'. Figure 1 also shows a 5-Year Estimate of 58% for LHRHa plus bicalutamide."
  B: value="57.9% (at 5 years)" | page=4 | modality=text | reasoning="The OS rate at 5 years was 57.9% in the control group. This is the latest follow-up reported."

---

If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The study population is 'patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer' but does not differentiate OS rates based on synchronous vs. metachronous metastasis."

OS Rate (%) | Low volume | Treatment.reasoning: Both sources agree that the OS rate for low volume metastasis by CHAARTED criteria in the treatment arm is not reported. The study reports OS rates based on SWOG criteria, which differ from CHAARTED criteria.

OS Rate (%) | Synchronous | Control.reasoning: Both sources agree that the OS rate for synchronous metastasis in the control arm is not reported, as the study does not differentiate OS rates based on synchronous vs. metachronous metastasis.

OS Rate (%) | Overall | Control.reasoning: Both sources provide the same OS rate at 5 years for the control arm. Source A's value is slightly more explicit and its reasoning is more comprehensive, including a reference to Figure 1.
